steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Predict Range Download · Theory Range Download
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 5745 during a regional recovery and budget exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate a versioned conditional range and prove SdkStream cleanup; do not treat TypeScript types, a resolved promise, CORS, ETag, or an emulator as stronger proof than it is; then deliver a duplicate or reordered event and prevent duplicate stakeholder effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, validate one bounded range, map inclusive offsets, cap response bytes, preserve Content-Range, and reject unsatisfiable or abusive requests.
